patch.value: Read-only audit of docs (AGENT_GUIDE, ARCHITECTURE, COMMANDS, CONFIGURATION, EXTENSIONS, SDK, ONBOARDING, QUICKSTART, RELEASING, TESTING), .github/workflows/* (ci.yml, auto-release.yml, release.yml, nightly.yml, codeql.yml, docs.yml), tests/ (unit/integration/search-eval), vitest.config.ts, and scripts/. Grounded in rg/Read evidence. Tracks items created from findings.
Identify and track genuine forward-work gaps in docs, CI, release reliability, and test/coverage quality

value.author: audit-docs-tests-agent
value.text:
Audit findings summary (2026-06-07):

DOCS DRIFT:
- ARCHITECTURE.md storage layout missing plans/, stories/, schema/, checkpoints/, runtime/ (pm-mcgf)
- pm-linked-test-adapters package undocumented in EXTENSIONS.md + TESTING.md (pm-yj8n)
- SDK.md registerImporter/registerExporter missing 3rd options arg example (pm-btwe)
- ARCHITECTURE.md: no performance/startup-latency section (pm-p37b)
- ARCHITECTURE.md: no new-command wiring checklist (pm-zyse)
- TESTING.md: no coverage governance section (pm-othr)
- TESTING.md: no search eval golden-query harness docs (pm-eg9k)
- RELEASING.md: no silent-skip debugging, pm-changelog separate-repo context, or tag-force-fetch docs (pm-97yv)

CI / RELEASE:
- codeql.yml uses @v3 floating tags, not SHA-pinned (pm-ji5c)
- nightly.yml has no failure alerting (pm-ehbb)
- 120-file unit cap: tests/unit/ has 122 files; governance test missing (pm-wc0d)

TESTS / COVERAGE:
- MCP pm_context, pm_contracts, pm_plan, pm_health: no integration tests (pm-8d00)
- close-many --rollback restore: no integration test for end-to-end cycle (pm-7p4w)
- schema add-type/remove-type round-trip: no integration test with governance (pm-4dtf)
- background-refresh (instant mutations): no integration test for non-blocking guarantee (pm-5rge)
- Windows path-separator: no explicit cross-platform coverage in fs-utils/store-paths (pm-tq5t)

ALL GREEN / WELL-COVERED:
- COMMANDS.md: gc --scope locks, history --diff, stats --storage all documented
- COMMANDS.md: schema add/remove-type/status fully documented
- COMMANDS.md: close-many, update-many with rollback documented
- AGENT_GUIDE.md: remediation_map and --fix-hints documented
- RELEASING.md: one-time setup, automated daily driver, workflow steps all current
- release.yml + auto-release.yml: all actions SHA-pinned; SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN guard present
- remediation-registry: has dedicated integration test (remediation-registry.spec.ts)
- Schema customization: unit test coverage present (schema-command, settings-validator, item-type-definition)
- docs.yml: quality:docs-skills + quality:docs-links gates both present

ADR CANDIDATES (not creating items per hard rules):
1. 'Nightly CI: informational vs required' - should Windows/Node-next nightly failures block release?
2. 'CodeQL action pinning exemption' - should codeql-action be SHA-pinned or exempt due to frequent SHA changes?
3. 'Search eval gate: advisory vs blocking' - should nDCG eval gate be promoted to blocking in CI?
4. 'Coverage governance: include+exclude pattern' - the dual-list strategy is an architectural decision not yet written as ADR
